topics.query_en: Entity Relationship Diagram cardinality and participation tutorial
topics.query_ar: شرح العلاقات و cardinality في ER Diagram
topics.reason: Students often confuse minimum and maximum cardinality constraints and struggle to identify mandatory versus optional participation from ambiguous business scenarios.

topics.query_en: UML Class Diagram associative classes explained
topics.query_ar: شرح Associative Class في UML Class Diagram
topics.reason: Identifying when a many-to-many association itself has attributes and needs to be modeled as a distinct class is conceptually challenging for beginners.

topics.query_en: UML Class Diagram aggregation vs composition difference
topics.query_ar: الفرق بين Aggregation و Composition في UML
topics.reason: Differentiating between a weak 'has-a' relationship (aggregation) and a strong lifecycle-dependent relationship (composition) is a frequent point of confusion.

topics.query_en: UML generalization and polymorphism explained with examples
topics.query_ar: شرح Generalization و Polymorphism في هندسة البرمجيات
topics.reason: Grasping how abstract parent classes pass down behaviors and how subclasses override them requires strong object-oriented thinking that goes beyond basic data modeling.

topics.topic_en: Translating Business Rules into Data Models
topics.topic_ar: تحويل قواعد العمل إلى نماذج بيانات (Business Rules)
topics.query_en: Translating business rules into conceptual data models
topics.query_ar: استخراج Business Rules وتحويلها إلى ERD
topics.reason: Extracting precise constraints, domains, and structural rules from unstructured, real-world text requires advanced analytical skills and logical deduction.
